ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c), CONTAINS($Label.CCCMRetrieveRecordTypeIds, RecordType.DeveloperName), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Closed'), ISBLANK( AccountId)) || AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c), CONTAINS($Label.CCCMRetrieveRecordTypeIds, RecordType.DeveloperName), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Closed'), ISBLANK(ContactId))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Contact & Account information are required to close the case
